theme: archivist merging boxes of letters between reading-room hours
title: Archivist's Compaction Cadence
strategies: trivial: never merge anything, every box stays its own block forever
greedy: box-count threshold trigger -- compact everything alive the moment more than 6 boxes exist, blind to when requests will land

strong: price a full compaction against the ENTIRE remaining lookup schedule (visible upfront) before committing -- merge only when the saved probes over the rest of the timeline outweigh the rewrite cost, so it clusters compactions right before demand and defers freely during write-only stretches
true optimal selective (non-global) merge schedule, jointly timed and grouped across overlapping runs (open ceiling, uncovered)
